---
name: "📚 Add or propose a subject"
about: "Suggest (or contribute) a curriculum backbone — the easiest way to help!"
title: "[subject] "
labels: ["good first issue", "backbone"]
---

Subjects are **just data** — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
You can propose one here, or open a PR directly with the JSON.

**Subject & language**
<!-- e.g. Music theory (English), 한국사 (Korean) -->

**Concepts, roughly basic → advanced**
<!-- a short ordered list is perfect, e.g.:
1. Pitch
2. Scales (needs: Pitch)
3. Chords (needs: Scales)
-->

**Are you up for opening the PR yourself?**
<!-- Totally fine either way — say "yes, point me at the template" or "proposing only". -->
